rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree blocks when concrete bounds or visible feature names are provided.
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees; use implementation annexes only for binding assignments when valid in scope.
generic_rules: Assumptions should constrain inputs using visible features and provided thresholds.
Guarantees should express output properties as boolean expressions derived from input conditions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Comparison expressions must evaluate to bool; use `eq` declarations to define reusable boolean conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not embed assumption or guarantee logic in implementation annexes unless binding assignments are the explicit intent.
Do not use unnamed literals or non-visible identifiers in expressions.
